headline: NetApp Q4 Earnings Call Highlights AI Demand and 2027 Outlook
summary: NTAP beats Q4 estimates, highlights 500 AI wins and forecasts faster fiscal 2027 growth as cloud, all-flash and AI demand gain momentum.
